title: Fix WebSocket authHandler listener leak and send() timeout leak
description: Two critical bugs in src/hass/websocket-client.ts: (1) authHandler added to socket.on('message') but only removed in resolve/reject paths — non-JSON messages during auth leave handler attached for socket lifetime. Use socket.once semantics or a resolved flag. (2) setTimeout in send() never cleared on success — 30s timer leak per request. Store timeout handle in pendingRequests and clear on resolve/reject.
validation: Read file, confirm socket.once pattern, confirm clearTimeout in resolve/reject. Run existing websocket tests.
